signals.quote: Just paid $2,500 for a credentialing consultant. Took 4 months. Worth every penny but wish I had a guide.
signals.job_to_be_done: Get credentialed with insurance panels to start seeing clients

signals.quote: Spent 3 hours trying to figure out the CAQH setup. Finally called my state association.
My credentialing got rejected twice because I didn't know about the CAQH attestation timing. Lost $8,000 in delayed revenue.
